title: Junior / Mid IT & Telecom Infrastructure Engineer

summary.lv: UC Warehouse, ekskluzīvs Adtran partneris Latvijā un sertificēts integrators Cisco, Meraki, Dell, Fortinet un IBM risinājumiem, meklē jaunāko vai vidēja līmeņa IT un telekomunikāciju infrastruktūras inženieri darbam ar Nutanix, Cisco, Adtran un DWDM optiskajiem tīkliem.
summary.en: UC Warehouse — exclusive Adtran partner in Latvia and certified integrator for Cisco, Meraki, Dell, Fortinet and IBM — is hiring a Junior / Mid IT & Telecom Infrastructure Engineer to install and maintain Nutanix, Cisco, Adtran and DWDM optical-network systems for customers across Latvia and beyond.
